url_observed: you.com/search (PII routed into GET query string via search/chat submission)
warning_text_observed:
⚠️ 보안 경고
민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.

context: W5.0 byte-inert regression for you.com. Used CORRECT methodology (url_query_blocked path) per baselines #1255 and #1274. Logged-out default Chrome profile (web-search path still routes PII into GET query string, login not required per #1255).
methodology_steps: 2. Pasted PII prompt '내 주민등록번호는 901010-1234567' into the 'Ask a question' search box and pressed Enter (submitted as a search/chat query).

3. you.com routed the query into a GET search request — window title became '내 주민등록번호는 901010-1234567 - You.com', UI switched to web-results/chat view (PII '주민등록번호' carried verbatim in q= query string) => engine url_query_blocked path triggered, block_session set.
4. Waited ~15s for engine to register block_session, then Ctrl+Shift+R hard reload WITHIN the 5-min window.

5. Page was REPLACED: window title became '보안 정책 - 접근 차단', SPA gone (no interactive elements), static Korean security-warning page rendered. Verbatim body captured via clipboard DOM (Ctrl+A / Ctrl+C).
comparison_to_baseline: Verbatim match to W4+W6 baseline #1274 and W3 re-test #1255: identical page-replacement delivery (title '보안 정책 - 접근 차단') and identical body '⚠️ 보안 경고 / 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다. / (This request was blocked due to sensitive information.)'. NO W5.0 regression in the you.com V6-F page-replacement path — W5.0 byte-inert CONFIRMED for you.
conclusion: PASS. Query submission carrying PII in the GET query string → engine url_query_blocked → block_session → V6-F request-side page replacement fired on the subsequent hard reload, rendering the Korean block warning containing '차단'. Verdict IDENTICAL to W4+W6 baseline #1256-1276 range. W5.0 additive-dormant WS-codec machinery did NOT regress the you service path.
